title: Bridge Essay: Microstructural organization of superior longitudinal fasciculus and cingulum bu

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Dashboard Diagnosis** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Metacognition as the 'diagnostic' capacity — science of knowing what you know, parallel to esoteric self-examination.

**Microstructural organization of superior longitudinal fasciculus and cingulum bundle support metacognition driven cognitive offloading.**. Scientific reports.. PMID: 41006786. DOI: 10.1038/s41598-025-18631-5. People often use external tools to offload cognitive demands associated with remembering future intentions. While previous research has established acausal role of metacognition in cognitive offloading, the neural basis of white matter tracts supporting this metacognitive control process remains unclear.
